failure_reason: Login failed on this tab — hradmin@nulogic.io returned 401, fallback fayaz@nulogic.io also returned 401 (both with Password@123 AND Welcome@123), and the auth endpoint rate-limited us with 429 after 2–3 attempts. Per worker contract rule 7 (≥2 login failures), shard returned early before probing the 13 HRMS ops pages.

bugs.title: HR_ADMIN fixture hradmin@nulogic.io returns 401 with contract password
Fallback SuperAdmin fayaz@nulogic.io also returns 401 with Password@123 — no working login for W2 shard
Auth rate-limiter 429 triggers after 2–3 attempts — blocks fallback recovery
